title:
PROMPT 019: Download Arrow вЂ” File Saving
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
CANVAS: 1920Г—1080px (16:9)
DURATION: 2.5s | LOOP: No
SVG: Download icon (4 paths: vertical line, arrowhead, horizontal base line, document rect behind) вЂ” centered 960Г—540px, 100px tall

COLOR SPECIFICATION:
Background: #F0FDF4 (very light green)
Arrow stroke: #16A34A (green, 6px)
Arrow fill (head): #16A34A
Base line stroke: #16A34A
Document rect fill: #DCFCE7 (pale green)
Document rect stroke: #16A34A (2px)
Progress bar fill: #16A34A

VISUAL LAYOUT:
Document rectangle (80Г—100px) with arrow inside pointing down.
Horizontal progress bar below icon (200px wide, 8px tall, rounded).

ANIMATION TIMELINE (2.5s total):
0вЂ“0.3s: Document rect fades in (opacity 0 в†’ 1.0, ease-out). No arrow yet.
0.3вЂ“0.6s: Arrow vertical line draws downward (dashoffset 100% в†’ 0%, ease-out).
0.6вЂ“0.8s: Arrowhead drops in (Y: -10px в†’ 0, opacity 0 в†’ 1.0, ease-out).
0.8вЂ“1.1s: Base line draws in (dashoffset 100% в†’ 0%, ease-out).
1.1вЂ“1.3s: Arrow and document scale 1.0 в†’ 1.1 в†’ 1.0 (recognition bounce).
1.3вЂ“2.0s: Progress bar fills Lв†’R (width 0 в†’ 200px, ease-in-out, 0.7s).
2.0вЂ“2.2s: Brief green pulse on whole icon (glow blur 0 в†’ 15px в†’ 0).
2.2вЂ“2.5s: Hold complete state.

EASING CURVES:
- Draw: ease-out
- Progress fill: ease-in-out
- Glow: ease-in-out
